subcodes.first_line: O thou favored maidservant of the Kingdom of God! The letter, which thou hast written, was received. Its contents evinced high aspiration…. The Temple is the most great foundation of the world of humanity and it has many branches
subcodes.first_line_orig: مشرق الأذکار از اعظم تأسيسات عالم انسانيست و تفرّعاتش بسيار است مشرق الأذکار اگر چه محلّ عبادتست
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @marriage as means of spiritual progress
